task_completion.description: The SRS document is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'SRS' document tab or title being highlighted or active in the main ReqView application window.

task_completion.description: The table view displays the 'ID', 'Description', and 'Status' columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the table headers in the document view to ensure 'ID', 'Description', and 'Status' are visible.

task_completion.description: A traceability column showing linked test cases from the TESTS document is present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a column header in the table that indicates traceability or links specifically to the 'TESTS' document (e.g., 'TESTS', 'Linked TESTS', or a traceability column showing test case IDs).

task_completion.description: A view named 'RTM_Audit' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the name 'RTM_Audit' in the views menu, dropdown list, or saved views sidebar.
Look at the current view indicator in the ReqView toolbar or view selector to verify 'RTM_Audit' is the currently applied and active view.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to configure the view.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the ReqView application window is visible and the configuration was done within its UI, with no terminal windows or code editors open to manipulate the project files directly.

integrity.description: The table displays actual requirement data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the table contains actual requirement rows with IDs and descriptions, rather than being an empty mock-up or a plain text file.

integrity.description: The view name and columns are part of the genuine ReqView UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the view name 'RTM_Audit' and the column headers are rendered as native UI elements within ReqView, not typed into a separate text editor or overlaid image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Document: 'SRS'. Required Standard Columns: 'ID', 'Description', 'Status'. Linked Document for Traceability: 'TESTS'. Target View Name: 'RTM_Audit'.
